description: A customer needs to change the email address associated with their account.

nodes.task_description: Authenticate the customer's identity using their old email and a security question.
Update the email address in the customer's profile.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully changes the email in the system.

nodes.task_description: Send a verification link to the new email address to confirm the change.

expected_outcome.value: Agent triggers the verification email process.
